Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Jiangsu Zhongtian Lighting Co..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Zhongtian Lighting Co. is registered as an electrical machinery manufacturer, but forensic analysis of its operational footprint dictates its true nature as an asset-light municipal engineering contractor and systems integrator. Although capitalized with a solid 5 million RMB fully paid-in, the entity officially reports a micro-workforce of merely 2 insured employees for the 2024 fiscal year. A massive contradiction exists between this 2-person headcount and its expansive business scope, which claims the manufacturing and design of stage lighting, solar/wind power products, and smart control systems. Furthermore, its digital footprint reveals a cluster of at least five different personal QQ email addresses, highlighting a decentralized, owner-operator team structure without corporate IT infrastructure. It operates by utilizing its 5M RMB capital to meet bidding qualifications for urban road lighting, landscape greening, and building security engineering projects, while outsourcing all physical equipment manufacturing to third-party OEMs and sub-contracting manual labor for installation.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 72)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / ASSET-LIGHT ENGINEERING CONTRACTOR
